---
title: "Bachelorarbeit-Florian-Mischke"
author: "Florian Mischke"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_document: default
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(kableExtra)
```

```{r}
results <- read.csv("data/Results.csv")

str(results)
summary(results)
```

```{r}
samples_images <- readxl::read_excel("data/samples_images.xlsx") 
```

```{r}
my_data <- merge(x = results, y = samples_images, by = "FileName", all = TRUE)
my_data_longer <- my_data |> pivot_longer(cols = c(Feret,maxWidth), names_to = "unit_cm", values_to = "value")
```


```{r}
my_data_longer |> ggplot(
  mapping = aes(
    x = Species,
    y = value,
    color = unit_cm
  )
) + geom_boxplot()
```

```{r}
my_data_longer |> filter(Species == "Acer platanoides") |> ggplot(
  mapping = aes(
    x = Location,
    y = value,
    color = unit_cm
  )
) + geom_boxplot()
```
